name: Crew Task Modifiers
source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules pp.76-82
description: Core rules modifiers for crew tasks. Only includes modifiers explicitly stated in the rules.

crew_looking.description: +1 per crew member assigned to Find Patron

TRADE.description: D100 on Trade Table per crew member. No roll modifiers.

extra_rolls.description: Pay 3 credits for each additional Trade Table roll

RECRUIT.description: Auto if crew <6. If crew >=6: 1D6 + crew recruiting, 6+ = success.

crew_recruiting.description: +1 per crew member assigned to Recruit (added to D6)

EXPLORE.description: D100 on Exploration Table per crew member. No roll modifiers.

TRACK.description: 1D6, modified by crew count and credits.

crew_tracking.description: +1 per crew member assigned to Track

REPAIR_KIT.description: 1D6 + Savvy, 6+ = success. Engineer: +1. Natural 1 = item destroyed.

savvy.description: Add crew member's Savvy stat to repair roll

engineer.description: +1 if the repairing crew member is an Engineer

credits_spent.description: Spend credits for additional bonus (spare parts)

DECOY.description: Passive: +1 per crew member to Rival avoidance roll. No dice roll.

crew_assigned.description: +1 per crew member assigned as Decoy (applied to Rival avoidance)
